name: Hepion Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
business: Hepion Pharmaceuticals is a medical diagnostics company that sells diagnostic tests for celiac disease, respiratory multiplex (Covid/Influenza A/B and RSV), helicobacter pylori, and hepatocellular carcinoma, currently eligible for sale in the European Union and certain markets that accept the CE mark.
sellsTo: healthcare providers in EU and eligible markets

exposures.sentence: On May 9, 2025, we entered into a license agreement (the License Agreement) with New Day Diagnostics LLC (New Day) pursuant to which we in-licensed certain diagnostic tests for celiac disease, respiratory multiplex (Covid/Influenza A/B and RSV), helicobacter pylori (H. pylori) and hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC).
Our initial product is a Class II device subject to 510(k) clearance.
